ast.name: textContent
ast.source: At least one option above must be enabled. If you enable the playground link, you must also enable the JSON file.
ast.target: 以上至少启用一个选项。如果启用了 playground 链接，还必须启用 JSON 文件。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Updating these settings will reset the playground editor and clipboard history.
ast.target: 更新这些设置将重置 playground 编辑器和剪贴板历史。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The Omnisearch plugin is required for searching playgrounds.
ast.target: 搜索 playground 需要 Omnisearch 插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include link to open playground in Livecodes
ast.target: 包含在 Livecodes 中打开 playground 的链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含 HTML 结果文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include markdown file with frontmatter and fenced codeblocks
ast.target: 包含带 frontmatter 和围栏代码块的 Markdown 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL for serving livecodes static codebase
ast.target: 用于提供 livecodes 静态代码库的 URL

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder for saving playground JSON files
ast.target: 用于保存 playground JSON 文件的 Vault 文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to watch for playground changes and save JSON file
ast.target: 启用以监听 playground 更改并保存 JSON 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder for saving playground notes
ast.target: 用于保存 playground 笔记的 Vault 文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable short URL service for sharing a playground URL. Click the help icon for privacy implications.
ast.target: 启用短链接服务以分享 playground URL。点击帮助图标了解隐私影响。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For creating Github gists. Click the help icon for further details.
ast.target: 用于创建 GitHub gists。点击帮助图标查看更多详情。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gists are secret by default. Enable this setting to create public gists.
ast.target: Gists 默认是私密的。启用此设置可创建公开 gists。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CSS height for livecodes playground. e.g. 600 or 100% (default: 600)
ast.target: livecodes playground 的 CSS 高度。例如 600 或 100%（默认：600）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the playground layout to horizontal or vertical. If set to "responsive", the layout is vertical in small screens when the playground height is larger than its width, otherwise horizontal. (default: responsive)
ast.target: 将 playground 布局设置为横向或纵向。如果设置为“responsive”，当 playground 高度大于宽度时在小屏幕上为纵向，否则为横向。（默认：responsive）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable word wrapping in editor pane
ast.target: 在编辑器窗格中启用自动换行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable line numbers in editor pane
ast.target: 在编辑器窗格中启用行号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use auto-complete to close brackets and quotes
ast.target: 使用自动补全关闭括号和引号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable auto updates of results pane after editor code changes
ast.target: 在编辑器代码更改后自动更新结果窗格

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time delay (in milliseconds) follwing code change, after which the result is updated.
ast.target: 代码更改后到结果更新的时间延迟（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable code formatter to use single quotes instead of double quotes
ast.target: 启用代码格式化器使用单引号代替双引号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable code formatter to use trailing commas
ast.target: 启用代码格式化以使用尾随逗号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default markup language when using the "Quick playground" command
ast.target: 使用“快速演练场”命令时的默认标记语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default style language when using the "Quick playground" command
ast.target: 使用“快速演练场”命令时的默认样式语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default script language when using the "Quick playground" command
ast.target: 使用“快速演练场”命令时的默认脚本语言

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Select a playground or type to search
ast.target: 选择一个演练场或输入以搜索

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Select a starter or type to search
ast.target: 选择一个入门模板或输入以搜索

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制指向 Playground 的 Markdown 链接

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制指向 Playground 的 Obsidian URL

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: 打印（到 stderr）格式化后光标在给定位置会移动到哪里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅换行符（\n），常见于 Linux 和 macOS 以及 git 仓库内

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows
ast.target: 回车 + 换行符（\r\n），常见于 Windows

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target:
保持现有
（同一文件中的混合值会通过查看第一行之后所用的内容进行规范化）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。将用于解析器推断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 在文件的第一个 docblock 注释中插入 @format 指示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加插件。可以通过单独的 `--plugin` 传入多个插件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.
ast.target: Prettier 尝试换行的行长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment
in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target:
要求文件的第一个 docblock 注释中包含 '@prettier' 或 '@format'
才会进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每个缩进级别的空格数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符缩进而非空格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号代替双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 文案超出打印宽度时换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将起始标签的 > 放在最后一行，而不是新起一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在 HTML、Vue 和 JSX 中强制每行仅一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to handle whitespaces in HTML.
ast.target: 如何处理 HTML 中的空白。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respect the default value of CSS display property.
ast.target: 遵循 CSS display 属性的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent script and style tags in Vue files.
ast.target: 在 Vue 文件中缩进 script 和 style 标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Load the playground from a custom URL (e.g. self-hosted app, permanent URL). Trailing slash / is required.

Default: https://v45.livecodes.io/
ast.target:
从自定义 URL 加载 playground（例如 自托管应用、永久 URL）。需要末尾斜杠 /。

默认值：https://v45.livecodes.io/

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This requires sending the playground configuration (including source code) to a server that saves the code and provides a short Id which can be used to retrieve the playground. It cannot then be deleted.

The app hosted on https://livecodes.io uses an API endpoint specifically provided to generate short URLs for LiveCodes share service. We will make every effort to keep that online and available for free use, so long as it is not abused.

Short URLs generated by LiveCodes share service are private by default and are not listed or indexed.

See Livecodes documentation page on sharing for further up-to-date details.
ast.target:
这需要将 playground 配置（包括源代码）发送到服务器，服务器会保存代码并提供一个可用于检索 playground 的短 ID。之后无法删除。

托管在 https://livecodes.io 的应用使用专门提供的 API 端点来为 LiveCodes 分享服务生成短 URL。我们将尽最大努力保持其在线并免费提供，只要不被滥用。

由 LiveCodes 分享服务生成的短 URL 默认是私有的，不会被列出或索引。

有关更多最新详情，请参阅 Livecodes 文档中的分享页面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a Github API token to enable creating gists from a playground. Create a token at https://github.com/settings/tokens/new (only gist permission required)
ast.target: 添加 Github API token 以启用从 playground 创建 gist。可在 https://github.com/settings/tokens/new 创建 token（仅需 gist 权限）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Select a vault folder to save & persist playground configuration files (JSON).

Default: playgrounds
ast.target:
选择一个保险库文件夹，用于保存并持久化 playground 配置文件（JSON）。

默认值：playgrounds

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Select a vault folder to save playground notes (Markdown).

Default: playgrounds/notes
ast.target:
选择一个保险库文件夹，用于保存 playground 笔记（Markdown）。

默认值：playgrounds/notes

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Automatically watch for playground changes, then update the corresponding configuration file (JSON).

Default: enabled
ast.target:
自动监视 playground 变更，然后更新对应的配置文件（JSON）。

默认值：启用

ast.name: description
ast.source:
LiveCodes supports AI-powered code completion, completely for free with no account or API token required, powered by Codeium, the ultrafast Copilot alternative.

The large generative machine learning model is capable of understanding the context of your code and comments in order to generate suggestions on what you might want to type next.

It has a wide range of language support.

Currently, only Monaco editor is supported. Wider editor support is planned.

Please note that when using Codeium AI assistant, your code is sent to their servers for code completion. However, your code is not used for training their model. Check Codeium FAQ and privacy policy for more details.
ast.target:
LiveCodes 支持 AI 驱动的代码补全，完全免费且无需账号或 API token，由超高速的 Copilot 替代方案 Codeium 提供支持。

该大型生成式机器学习模型能够理解你的代码和注释的上下文，从而生成你可能想要接着输入的建议。

它支持多种语言。

目前仅支持 Monaco 编辑器，后续计划支持更多编辑器。

请注意，使用 Codeium AI 助手时，你的代码会发送到其服务器以进行代码补全。不过，你的代码不会被用于训练其模型。更多详情请查看 Codeium 的 FAQ 和 隐私政策。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please consider sponsoring the developers.
ast.target: 如果该插件对你有价值并且你愿意帮助支持持续开发，请考虑赞助开发者。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Automatically watch for playground changes, then update the corresponding playground configuration file (JSON).

Default: enabled

(1 of 10)
ast.target:
自动监视 playground 变更，然后更新对应的 playground 配置文件（JSON）。

默认值：启用

（1/10）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The new playground will be opened in a new playground view.

(3 of 10)
ast.target:
新的 playground 将在新的 playground 视图中打开。

（3/10）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Save playground results to HTML. A prompt will ask where to save the HTML file on your device.

(4 of 10)
ast.target:
将 playground 结果保存为 HTML。将提示你在设备上保存 HTML 文件的位置。

（4/10）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Copy playground results HTML to the clipboard.

(5 of 10)
ast.target:
将 playground 结果 HTML 复制到剪贴板。

（5/10）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The generated URL encodes the playground configuration in a base-64-encoded compressed query string. This step is generated locally without sending the code to any server. However, depending on the size of the playground, the URL can be very long.

If Short share URL is enabled in settings, a short share URL will be generated.

This requires sending the playground configuration (including source code) to a server that saves the code and provides a short Id which can be used to retrieve the playground.

See Livecodes documentation page on sharing for further up-to-date details.

(6 of 10)
ast.target:
生成的 URL 将 playground 配置编码为 base-64 编码的压缩查询字符串。此步骤在本地生成，不会将代码发送到任何服务器。不过，根据 playground 的大小，URL 可能会非常长。

如果在设置中启用了 短分享 URL，将生成短分享 URL。

这需要将 playground 配置（包括源代码）发送到服务器，服务器会保存代码并提供一个可用于检索 playground 的短 ID。

有关更多最新详情，请参阅 Livecodes 文档中的分享页面。

（6/10）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
URLs to external CSS stylesheets and JS scripts can be added to the playground. URLs to stylesheets/scripts should be added each in a separate line. Stylesheets and scripts are loaded in the result page before editor codes. Thus, CSS properties defined in external stylesheets can be overriden in the style editor. Global javascript variables defined in external scripts are available to code in the script editor.

Choice of CSS presets, currently Normalize.css and Reset CSS.

(9 of 10)
ast.target:
可将外部 CSS 样式表 和 JS 脚本 的 URL 添加到 playground。样式表/脚本的 URL 应分别单独一行添加。样式表和脚本会在结果页面中先于编辑器代码加载。因此，外部样式表中定义的 CSS 属性可在样式编辑器中被覆盖。外部脚本中定义的全局 JavaScript 变量可在脚本编辑器中使用。

可选择 CSS 预设，目前有 Normalize.css 和 Reset CSS。

（9/10）
